text: Guide lines to become a 4th Degree Knight
1- Determine which Assembly you wish to become a member:
Father John Bosch Assembly 2840 - Manteca c.
e. Msgr. Gruber/Western Serra Assembly 3340 - Oakdale
2- When filling out and submitting your Form 4 make sure that:
a. Have your membership number recorded on the top right of the form
b. Check appropriate box (New Member etc.)
c. Include all your personal info at the left of form which includes:
i. DOB, Marital Status, 1st Degree Date, & Council number
d. Record the Assembly number (Middle right of form) and the city it is in
e. Hand the Form 4 to your Council’s Financial Secretary to complete the data and
f. Sign and date form 4 at the left bottom part of form as indicated
g. This is a must, get your proposer to sign, date and put his member number in the
h. Proposer is to turn your form 4 along with your check for the Exemplification fee
(Check with your proposer or Assembly about the fee required and when) into
meeting. the Assembly to be read and voted on at their next business
i. Assembly Faithful Navigator must sign and date form 4
j. Assembly Comptroller must sign and date form 4
3- Assembly Comptroller will submit Form 4 with the applicable fees to the District Master
4- The Assembly will send the Exemplification Information Packet and flyer when received to
a. The Comptroller will notify the DD, GKs in their areas of the date, time, and place
of the Exemplification and make the Exemplification Packet immediately available
b. DDs, GKs, will notify each proposer and applicate of the impending details
Degree c. Typical attire for the 4th
Business suit, conservative tie, white shirt (no button-down collars, no cuff links)
For Candidates, a tuxedo is NOT recommended.
Business suit, conservative tie, white shirt (no button-down collars, no cuff links)
Black tuxedo for men with social baldric and name badge.
Ladies: Appropriate cocktail dress or evening attire
Instructions on how to fill out the Form 4 on the following page.
This is called the "What Goes Where" Form to show what information must be placed into each of the respective boxes.
Last Name, First Name, Middle Initial Title, if any
Assembly # Location of Assembly Candidate is joining
Signature of Applicant and date These two lines filled out by candidate's Council FS
These fields to be signed by Faithful This area filled out by the District Master
Please obtain a Form 4 (Multiple copy form 4-pages) from any one of the following: Your sponsor, SK,
GK, DD, or Brother Knight and fill out the top form (Multiple copies automatically made).
An electronic copy of this is available here on our website by clicking on:
Please download and save a copy onto your computer and then "OPEN THIS FILE ON YOUR COMPUTE" and
completely "FILL OUT THE VERY FIRST PAGE ONLY". Once you have it completed, DON'T try to save it, BUT
PRINT it as the data entered will not be preserver. TIP: If you have the capability to do a "SAVE AS a .PDF",
this will preserver it with all the data that you filled in which includes the other (3) pages that will automatically
be completed by the Form for you.
Once filled out print a copy off on your printer, Sign your name on each of the individual form 4 pages and turn
them over to your Council's Financial Secretary for his signature and certification, again on each of the 4 pages.
The form should then be given to your proposer for submission at the next Assembly Business Meeting.
Your proposer will keep you informed of the progress.
